data.title: Itaú Unibanco Publishes Global Policy Governing Trading of Its Securities
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Itau Unibanco ( (ITUB) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On January 26, 2026, Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to publicly disclose an updated global Policy for Trading Itaú Unibanco securities. The policy formalizes detailed rules and blackout periods for trading the bank’s shares, ADRs and other securities issued by the company or its controlled entities in Brazil, as well as derivatives and certain investment fund units tied to these instruments. It clearly defines which executives, employees, related parties and third‑party service providers are bound by the rules, sets responsibilities for a Disclosure and Trading Committee led by the Investor Relations Officer, and imposes restrictions on trading around undisclosed material information, during exceptional restriction periods, and within minimum holding periods. By tightening governance over insider trading and clarifying obligations for insiders and related entities, the new framework aims to enhance transparency and investor protection, reinforcing Itaú Unibanco’s compliance posture in both Brazilian and U.S. capital markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (ITUB) stock is a Hold with a $9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Itau Unibanco stock, see the ITUB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ITUB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ITUB is a Neutral.

Itau Unibanco’s overall stock score is driven by strong financial performance in terms of revenue growth and profitability, despite challenges with leverage and cash flow. The technical analysis supports a positive trend, and the valuation is attractive with a reasonable P/E ratio and high dividend yield. The absence of earnings call and corporate events data limits further insights.

To see Spark’s full report on ITUB stock, click here.

More about Itau Unibanco

Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. is a Brazilian financial services group and one of Latin America’s largest banking conglomerates, offering retail and wholesale banking, investment banking, asset management and related financial products in Brazil and abroad, including through securities such as shares and ADRs listed in international markets.

data.title: SkyWater Technology to Be Acquired by IonQ in Merger
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from SkyWater Technology ( (SKYT) ) is now available.

On January 25, 2026, SkyWater Technology, Inc. entered into a merger agreement with quantum computing company IonQ, Inc. under which SkyWater will be acquired in a two-step merger and become an indirect, wholly owned subsidiary of IonQ. Under the terms, each outstanding SkyWater common share (other than excluded shares and appraisal shares) will be converted at closing into the right to receive $15 in cash plus a number of IonQ shares determined by a formula tied to IonQ’s 20-day volume-weighted average price, subject to a collar that sets the exchange ratio between 0.3326 and 0.5265 IonQ shares. SkyWater’s equity awards will be rolled into IonQ equity (with board RSUs vesting and settling before closing), and the SkyWater board has unanimously approved the deal, deemed it fair and in the best interests of shareholders, and agreed to recommend it, while securing voting commitments from stockholders representing about 19.9% of the company’s voting power. Closing is contingent on shareholder approval, antitrust clearance under the Hart-Scott-Rodino Act, absence of legal injunctions, and the non-occurrence of material adverse effects, but is not subject to a financing condition; upon completion, SkyWater’s shares will be delisted from Nasdaq and deregistered. The agreement includes standard deal protections and fiduciary-out provisions, a $51.6 million termination fee payable by SkyWater under specified circumstances involving superior proposals or failed shareholder approval following an acquisition approach, and an obligation by IonQ to make a post-termination equity investment by purchasing 2,857,143 newly issued SkyWater shares if the deal collapses due to timing out or antitrust blocks, in which case IonQ will also be subject to standstill restrictions for up to two years, providing SkyWater with capital and partial downside protection if regulatory or timing hurdles derail the transaction.

The most recent analyst rating on (SKYT) stock is a Buy with a $35.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SkyWater Technology stock, see the SKYT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SKYT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SKYT is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak profitability, stressed cash flow, and high leverage, despite strong revenue growth. Offsetting positives include bullish technical momentum and a strong earnings call with upbeat guidance and Fab 25 execution; valuation also appears reasonable with a ~11 P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on SKYT stock, click here.

More about SkyWater Technology

SkyWater Technology, Inc. is a U.S.-based semiconductor manufacturer operating fabrication facilities, with a business focused on specialized chip production and related services, including newly acquired operations in Texas known as Fab 25. The company serves government and commercial customers in markets that value secure, domestic manufacturing capacity and custom semiconductor solutions, and relies on key customer relationships and U.S. government program funding as important drivers of demand.

Average Trading Volume: 2,134,966

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.52B

Find detailed analytics on SKYT stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Jeffs’ Brands Faces Nasdaq Compliance Review as KeepZone AI Secures First Anti-Drone Order
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Jeffs’ Brands Ltd. ( (JFBR) ) has issued an announcement.

On January 22, 2026, Jeffs’ Brands received a Nasdaq notice that its ordinary shares had failed for 30 consecutive business days to meet the $1 million minimum market value of publicly held shares required for continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The company has until July 21, 2026 to regain compliance, with its shares and warrants continuing to trade under the symbols JFBR and JFBRW during this period; Jeffs’ Brands maintains that, based on its records and recent trading data, it believes it can demonstrate compliance, but if it cannot, it will consider available options to cure the deficiency. Separately, on January 26, 2026, its subsidiary KeepZone AI received its first commercial purchase order for a net-launching counter‑drone system from an aerospace systems integrator in Mexico, a deal that converts recent reseller and distribution agreements into initial revenue-generating deployment and reinforces Jeffs’ Brands’ strategic expansion into AI-driven homeland security solutions across multiple international markets.

More about Jeffs’ Brands Ltd.

Jeffs’ Brands Ltd is a data-driven e-commerce company operating on the Amazon Marketplace that has recently pivoted into the global homeland security sector through its wholly owned subsidiary KeepZone AI Inc., following a December 2025 distribution agreement with Scanary Ltd. The company aims to deliver comprehensive, multi-layered, AI-enhanced security ecosystems for critical infrastructure worldwide, targeting the growing homeland security market while leveraging its expertise in data-driven operations.

Average Trading Volume: 5,654,338

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.54M

data.title: LINKBANCORP Declares Dividend Amid Weaker Quarter Results
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from LINKBANCORP ( (LNKB) ).

On January 22, 2026, LINKBANCORP’s board declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.075 per share, payable on March 16, 2026 to shareholders of record on February 27, 2026, underscoring continued capital returns despite a weaker fourth quarter. The bank reported net income of $2.9 million, or $0.08 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter of 2025, down sharply from $7.8 million in the prior quarter due to a full $5 million impairment on a single commercial lending relationship tied to purported fraudulent activity identified in January 2026, but delivered record full-year 2025 earnings of $33.5 million, or $0.90 per diluted share, up 26.8% from 2024. Adjusted pre-tax, pre-provision net income rose to $11.7 million in the quarter and $41.8 million for the year, tangible book value per share climbed 15.7% year over year, and the bank logged robust commercial loan growth and 10.9% adjusted deposit growth, even as year-end deposits dipped sequentially on seasonal outflows. These results, alongside a stable net interest margin and expanding balance sheet, come as LINKBANCORP advances a strategic all-stock merger with Burke & Herbert Financial Services Corp. announced on December 18, 2025, which is expected to create a roughly $11 billion-asset Mid-Atlantic community banking franchise, potentially strengthening the company’s competitive position and scale for stakeholders once customary approvals and closing conditions are met.

The most recent analyst rating on (LNKB) stock is a Buy with a $10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on LINKBANCORP stock, see the LNKB Stock Forecast page.

LINKBANCORP, Inc., based in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, is a Nasdaq-listed bank holding company and parent of LINKBANK, operating as a community-focused lender with a growing Mid-Atlantic deposit and commercial banking franchise. The company concentrates on commercial loans, deposit gathering across retail, professional services and commercial clients, and positions itself for regional expansion through both organic growth and strategic M&A.

data.title: Semrush Faces Shareholder Lawsuits Over Proposed Adobe Merger
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

SEMrush Holdings ( (SEMR) ) has shared an announcement.

On December 29, 2025, Semrush Holdings, Inc. filed a definitive proxy statement with the SEC for a special shareholder meeting scheduled on February 3, 2026, to vote on its proposed acquisition by Adobe Inc., under a November 18, 2025 merger agreement that would see Semrush become a wholly owned Adobe subsidiary. Between January 13 and January 15, 2026, three Semrush stockholders filed lawsuits in New York and Massachusetts courts alleging that the proxy statement for the Adobe deal contained material misrepresentations and omissions, seeking to block completion of the merger; while Semrush considers the claims meritless, it has issued supplemental disclosures—detailing board deliberations, formation of a transaction committee, outreach to alternative bidders, Adobe’s revised offer terms, and specific valuation comparables—aimed at mooting the disclosure challenges and reducing litigation risk, though the ultimate outcome and any impact on closing the transaction remain uncertain.

The most recent analyst rating on (SEMR) stock is a Buy with a $13.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SEMrush Holdings stock, see the SEMR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SEMR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SEMR is a Outperform.

SEMrush Holdings’ overall stock score is driven by strong technical momentum and positive corporate events, notably the merger with Adobe. While financial performance shows solid revenue growth and cash flow, profitability challenges and a negative P/E ratio weigh on the valuation. The strategic focus on AI and enterprise solutions, as highlighted in the earnings call, supports future growth prospects.

To see Spark’s full report on SEMR stock, click here.

More about SEMrush Holdings

Semrush Holdings, Inc. is a Delaware-based provider of digital marketing and search engine optimization (SEO) software, offering analytics and online visibility tools used by marketers and businesses to manage and optimize their online presence across global markets.

Grayscale Stellar Lumens Trust ( (GXLM) ) just unveiled an update.

On January 20, 2026, CoinDesk Indices, the index provider for Grayscale Stellar Lumens Trust, altered the mix of digital asset trading platforms used to calculate the Trust’s XLM benchmark rate, adding Binance’s XLM-USDC pair while removing Bitfinex’s XLM-USD pair following its monthly review of venue eligibility. As of that date, the Index Price for the Trust is now based on XLM-USD trading pairs from Bitstamp by Robinhood, Crypto.com, Kraken, and OKX, and XLM-USDC trading pairs from Binance and Bybit, underscoring the ongoing role of exchange selection and periodic reviews in shaping the benchmark that underpins valuation and pricing for Trust stakeholders.

More about Grayscale Stellar Lumens Trust

Grayscale Stellar Lumens Trust (XLM) is a digital asset investment vehicle that offers exposure to Stellar Lumens (XLM), tracking a benchmark index price derived from trading activity across selected cryptocurrency exchanges. The Trust operates within the broader digital asset and crypto index industry, relying on third-party index calculation from CoinDesk Indices to determine its reference price for XLM via specified U.S. dollar and stablecoin trading pairs on vetted trading platforms.

data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Capital Bancorp ( (CBNK) ) has issued an announcement.

On January 26, 2026, Capital Bancorp reported fourth-quarter 2025 GAAP net income of $15.0 million, or $0.91 per diluted share, essentially flat versus the prior quarter but up sharply from $7.5 million a year earlier, as record full-year 2025 earnings were driven by double-digit balance sheet growth and a robust 1.71% return on assets. For the quarter ended December 31, 2025, the bank posted strong loan growth of 19.3% on an annualized basis and 12.5% year over year, deposit growth of 24.6% annualized from the third quarter and 12.0% from the prior year, expanding tangible book value per share by 3.4% from the third quarter and 15.5% from fourth-quarter 2024, while maintaining an allowance for credit losses of 1.85% of total loans and generating a net interest margin of 5.94% despite lower purchase accounting accretion. Core profitability metrics improved, with core ROA at 1.71%, core ROE at 15.23% and core ROTCE at 17.23%, and the company underscored its capital return and balance-sheet management by declaring a $0.12 per share cash dividend payable February 28, 2026 and repurchasing 304,288 shares in the quarter at an average price of $28.12, signaling continued confidence in its strategy and positioning for profitable organic growth and future bolt-on acquisitions following completion of the IFH integration.

The most recent analyst rating on (CBNK) stock is a Buy with a $34.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Capital Bancorp stock, see the CBNK Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Maris-Tech Tightens Note Conversion Ownership Cap and Scraps Planned Shareholder Meeting
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Maris-Tech Ltd. ( (MTEK) ) has shared an announcement.

On January 26, 2026, Maris-Tech Ltd. amended the terms of $2 million in convertible promissory notes issued on November 25, 2025 to two institutional investors, cutting the beneficial ownership cap on conversions from 9.99% to 4.99% of its outstanding ordinary shares. To enforce this tighter ownership limit while still honoring conversion rights, any portion of a conversion (including future mandatory conversions at the 24‑month maturity mark) that would push an investor above the 4.99% threshold will now be settled in newly created pre-funded warrants rather than additional ordinary shares, with those warrants also subject to the same ownership cap; all other key economic terms of the notes and related purchase agreements remain unchanged, signaling a move to manage potential concentration of ownership and dilution. In a separate update, the company said it will not proceed with a previously announced shareholder meeting disclosed in December 2025 and indicated it will provide a further update if and when a new meeting is scheduled, leaving investors awaiting clarity on the timing and forum for future shareholder decisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (MTEK) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Maris-Tech Ltd. stock, see the MTEK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MTEK Stock

Maris-Tech Ltd.’s stock score is primarily impacted by its financial performance challenges, including profitability and liquidity issues. Technical analysis suggests potential bearish momentum, while valuation metrics highlight unprofitability concerns. The absence of earnings call data and corporate events limits additional insights.

To see Spark’s full report on MTEK stock, click here.

Grupo Financiero Galicia SA ( (GGAL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On January 23, 2026, Argentina’s National Commission for the Defense of Competition authorized Grupo Financiero Galicia’s acquisition of exclusive control over HSBC Bank Argentina and several related local HSBC entities, including holdings, asset management and life and retirement insurance companies, a decision disclosed publicly on January 26, 2026. The approval clears a key regulatory hurdle for Galicia’s planned economic concentration, paving the way for a significant expansion of its banking, asset management and insurance footprint in Argentina and potentially reshaping competitive dynamics in the country’s financial sector as HSBC’s local operations are integrated into the Galicia group.

On January 26, 2026, Global Interactive Technologies, Inc. entered into a definitive agreement with globally recognized K-pop group ATEEZ for the production and performance of the official theme song for the upcoming animated feature The Legend of MegaRace. data.title: Telecom Argentina to Fully Redeem US$162.7 Million 8% Senior Notes Due 2026 in February
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Telecom Argentina ( (TEO) ) has provided an announcement.

On January 26, 2026, Telecom Argentina announced it will fully redeem the remaining US$162.747 million of its 8.000% Senior Notes due 2026 (Class 1 notes issued in July 2019) on February 25, 2026, at 100% of principal plus accrued and unpaid interest, for a total redemption price of about US$164.085 million. The redemption, carried out under the optional redemption provisions of the indenture and prospectus, will extinguish all obligations under these securities, trigger cancellation of the notes, and lead to their delisting from the Luxembourg and Argentine markets, marking a further step in the company’s balance-sheet management and the simplification of its outstanding debt structure for bondholders and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TEO) stock is a Hold with a $14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Telecom Argentina stock, see the TEO Stock Forecast page.

More about Telecom Argentina

The latest announcement is out from BitMine Immersion Technologies ( (BMNR) ).

On January 23, 2026, Bitmine Immersion Technologies appointed its current Chief Financial Officer and Chief Operating Officer, Young Kim, to the company’s board of directors, formalizing his expanded governance role without any special arrangements or related-party ties disclosed. In a January 26, 2026 operational update, Bitmine reported total crypto, cash and “moonshot” holdings of $12.8 billion, including 4.243 million ETH—equivalent to 3.52% of total ETH supply—193 Bitcoin, $682 million in cash, and minority stakes in Beast Industries and Eightco Holdings, reinforcing its status as the world’s largest Ethereum treasury and the second-largest global corporate crypto treasury. The company highlighted that it has staked over 2 million ETH, is progressing toward full staking of its ETH via its forthcoming MAVAN platform, and estimates that fully staking its holdings at the current composite Ethereum staking rate could generate roughly $374 million in annual staking fees, while its stock’s elevated trading volume has made BMNR one of the 100 most traded U.S. equities, underscoring growing market interest in its aggressive ETH accumulation strategy amid broader institutional and policy momentum around digital assets.

The most recent analyst rating on (BMNR) stock is a Buy with a $39.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BitMine Immersion Technologies stock, see the BMNR Stock Forecast page.

More about BitMine Immersion Technologies

Bitmine Immersion Technologies, Inc. (NYSE American: BMNR) is a Bitcoin and Ethereum network company and the world’s leading Ethereum treasury, focused on accumulating ETH as its primary treasury reserve asset for long-term investment on behalf of institutional and public-market investors. The company pursues an innovative digital-asset strategy centered on protocol-level activities such as staking and decentralized finance, and plans to launch its dedicated Made-in America Validator Network (MAVAN) staking infrastructure in the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: Swedish Export Credit Corporation Posts Lower 2025 Profit but Delivers Record New Business and Strong Capital
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from ELEMENTS Linked to the ICE BofAML Commodity Index eXtra Biofuels Total Return ( (FUE) ).

On January 26, 2026, Swedish Export Credit Corporation reported its year-end 2025 results, showing lower profitability but strong business volumes and a solid capital position. For January–December 2025, net interest income fell to Skr 2,719 million from Skr 3,058 million a year earlier, operating profit declined to Skr 1,491 million from Skr 2,121 million, and net profit dropped to Skr 1,183 million from Skr 1,683 million, pressured by lower Swedish short-term interest rates, a stronger krona and higher provisions for expected credit losses tied to a few exposures in the fourth quarter. The lending portfolio shrank 7.3% to Skr 262.7 billion, although sustainability-classified lending increased to Skr 56.3 billion, and the total capital ratio improved to 23.1% while total assets eased to Skr 350.0 billion. Despite weaker earnings and a proposed dividend of Skr 473 million, SEK recorded one of the highest volumes of new credit and guarantee commitments in its history at Skr 125.8 billion for 2025, including Skr 28.5 billion in the fourth quarter, supported by deals in European energy infrastructure, offshore wind, and fossil-free steel, as well as financing agreements with new corporate clients. Long-term borrowing surged to Skr 94 billion from Skr 53 billion in 2024, broadening the investor base and maintaining outstanding senior debt at Skr 304.6 billion, while the company’s strengthened credit facility with the Swedish National Debt Office and a new memorandum of understanding with Saudi Export-Import Bank further bolster its capacity to back Swedish exporters amid elevated geopolitical tensions and a gradually improving economic outlook.

More about ELEMENTS Linked to the ICE BofAML Commodity Index eXtra Biofuels Total Return

Aktiebolaget Svensk Exportkredit (AB SEK), or Swedish Export Credit Corporation, is a state-owned financial institution that provides export credits, guarantees and long-term financing to support the competitiveness of Swedish export companies. The company focuses on lending to large industrial, infrastructure and energy projects, including sustainability-classified and green financing, and funds its activities through active participation in international capital markets with long-term senior debt issuance in multiple currencies.

Learn more about FUE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
